title: narcissus minor var. brevicoronatus
intro: Narcissus minor var. brevicoronatus, also known as the small-flowered narcissus or short-cupped narcissus, is a variety of the narcissus plant belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to contain alkaloids with potential antispasmodic and anticholinergic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. Narcissus minor var. brevicoronatus can be used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
